holdings.infoBox: FLTW is an equity ETF with a total of 135 individual holdings. The top holdings are Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company stock at 17.33%, MediaTek at 10.14%, Delta Electronics at 6.59%, Hon Hai Precision Industry at 5.04%, and ASE Technology Holding at 2.99%.

overview.description: The Franklin FTSE Taiwan ETF (FLTW) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the FTSE Taiwan RIC Capped index, a market-cap-weighted index of Taiwanese companies, excluding small-caps. FLTW was launched on Nov 2, 2017 and is issued by Franklin Templeton.
